title: Alois Heinz
text: Home * People * Alois Heinz Alois Heinz [1] Alois P. Heinz , a German mathematician, computer scientist and professor of CS at Heilbronn University . He received a diplom degree in CS from RWTH Aachen in 1984, a Ph.D. in mathematics, and habilitaion in CS from University of Freiburg in 1990 and 1994 respectively. His reaearch includes machine learning , neural networks and neural trees as descendants of decision trees [2] , also applied to evaluation of a alpha-beta search as generalization of lazy evaluation [3] [4] .
